name: AdvancedJump
tags: platformer,platform,jump,ledge tolerance,coyote time,air jump,wall jump,wall sliding,dash,dive
previewIconUrl: https://resources.gdevelop-app.com/assets/Icons/Line Hero Pack/Master/SVG/Sports and Fitness/Sports and Fitness_training_running_run.svg
shortDescription: Platformer air jump, wall jump/slide, coyote time, horizontal dash, and dive dash.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Let platformer characters jump shortly after leaving a platform and also jump in mid-air.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: AdvancedJump

eventsFunctions.name: SetCoyoteTime
eventsFunctions.description: Change the coyote time duration of an object (in seconds).

eventsFunctions.name: CanCoyoteJump
eventsFunctions.description: Check if a coyote jump can currently happen.

eventsFunctions.name: AirJumpsMax
eventsFunctions.description: Number of jumps in mid-air that are allowed.

eventsFunctions.name: RemainingAirJumps
eventsFunctions.description: Number of jumps in mid-air that are still allowed.

eventsFunctions.name: SetAirJumpCountMaximum
eventsFunctions.description: Change the number of times the character can jump in mid-air.

eventsFunctions.name: RemoveOneRemainingAirJump
eventsFunctions.description: Remove one of the remaining air jumps of a character.

eventsFunctions.name: ResetAirJumpCounter
eventsFunctions.description: Allow back all air jumps of a character.

eventsFunctions.name: AreFloorJumpCountedAsAirJump
eventsFunctions.fullName: Floor jumps count as air jumps
eventsFunctions.description: Check if floor jumps are counted as air jumps for an object.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Let platformer characters jump and slide against walls.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: WallJump

eventsFunctions.name: HasJustWallJumped
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object has just wall jumped.

eventsFunctions.name: IsWallJumping
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object is wall jumping.

eventsFunctions.name: IsAgaintWall
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object is against a wall.

eventsFunctions.name: JumpTimeFrame
eventsFunctions.description: The wall jump detection time frame of an object (in seconds).

eventsFunctions.name: SetJumpTimeFrame
eventsFunctions.description: Change the wall jump detection time frame of an object (in seconds).

eventsFunctions.name: WallJumpSpeedX
eventsFunctions.description: The side speed of wall jumps of an object (in pixels per second).

eventsFunctions.name: SetWallJumpSpeedX
eventsFunctions.description: Change the side speed of wall jumps of an object (in pixels per second).

eventsFunctions.name: WallJumpAccelerationX
eventsFunctions.description: The side acceleration of wall jumps of an object (in pixels per second per second).

eventsFunctions.name: SetWallJumpAccelerationX
eventsFunctions.description: Change the side acceleration of wall jumps of an object (in pixels per second per second).

eventsFunctions.name: WallSlidingGravity
eventsFunctions.description: The wall sliding gravity of an object (in pixels per second per second).

eventsFunctions.name: SetWallSlidingGravity
eventsFunctions.description: Change the wall sliding gravity of an object (in pixels per second per second).

eventsFunctions.name: WallSlidingMaxFallingSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: The wall sliding maximum falling speed of an object (in pixels per second).

eventsFunctions.name: SetWallSlidingMaxFallingSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Change the wall sliding maximum falling speed of an object (in pixels per second).

eventsFunctions.name: WallSlidingSpeedAbsorption
eventsFunctions.description: Change the impact speed absorption of an object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetWallSlidingSpeedAbsorption
eventsFunctions.description: Change the impact speed absorption of an object.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Make platformer characters dash toward the floor.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: DiveDash

eventsFunctions.name: SimulateDiveKey
eventsFunctions.description: Simulate a press of dive key to make the object dives to the floor if it can dive.

eventsFunctions.name: CanDive
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object can dive.

eventsFunctions.name: IsDiving
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object is diving.

eventsFunctions.name: SimulateDashKey
eventsFunctions.description: Simulate a press of dash key.

eventsFunctions.name: IsDashing
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object is dashing.

eventsFunctions.name: AbortDash
eventsFunctions.description: Abort the current dash and set the object to its usual horizontal speed.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Resolve conflict between platformer character configuration changes.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: PlatformerConfigurationStack

eventsFunctions.name: RevertConfiguration
eventsFunctions.description: Revert configuration changes for one identifier and update the character configuration to use the most recent ones.

eventsFunctions.name: UsualMaxSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Return the usual maximum horizontal speed when no configuration change applies on it.

eventsFunctions.name: ConfigureGravity
eventsFunctions.description: Configure character gravity for a given configuration layer and move this layer on top.

eventsFunctions.name: ConfigureDeceleration
eventsFunctions.description: Configure character deceleration for a given configuration layer and move this layer on top.

eventsFunctions.name: ConfigureMaxSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Configure character maximum speed for a given configuration layer and move this layer on top.

eventsFunctions.name: ConfigureAcceleration
eventsFunctions.description: Configure character acceleration for a given configuration layer and move this layer on top.

eventsFunctions.name: ConfigureMaxFallSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Configure character maximum falling speed for a given configuration layer and move this layer on top.

description:
This extension provides behaviors to:

* Jump in mid-air
* Jump and slide against walls
* Dash horizontally
* Dash toward the floor
* Do coyote time, also known as "ledge tolerance". It lets players jumping even after their character is no longer touching the ground for a given amount of time. It aims to give players a feeling of control and reduce frustration.

An example allows to check it out ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://platformer-moves)).
